headings: 3-2 ADMINISTRATIVE REVIEW ON LABOR STANDARDS DISPUTES.
text: If informal exchanges do not result in agreement, the final determination and schedule of back wages due will be presented to you in writing and you will be permitted 30 days in which to correct the underpayment(s) or to request a hearing on the matter before the DOL.  The request for hearing must be made in writing through the contract administrator and must explain what findings are in dispute and the reasons.  In such cases, HUD is required to submit a report to DOL for review and further consideration.  All requests for DOL hearing must be submitted through the HUD Headquarters Office of Labor Relations.
